mapper.select:
SELECT
STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(S.date, '%Y-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(S.date, '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') NULL S.date AS date,
S.day AS day,
M.title DATE_FORMAT(SC.start_at, '%H시') NULL AS title,
SUM(S.revenue) AS revenue, SUM(S.customer_count) AS customerCount FROM statistics S JOIN schedule SC ON S.schedule_id = SC.id
JOIN movie M ON SC.movie_id = M.movie_id
WHERE S.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(S.date, '%Y') DATE_FORMAT(S.date, '%Y-%m') M.title DATE_FORMAT(SC.start_at, '%H') S.date
ORDER BY
title ASC date ASC
